label: Gleamthread Dust Vault
description: Gleamthread Dust Vault occupies a sealed rear chamber of Gleamthread Lapidary, built of basalt glass blockwork whose joints are traced with seam-line datum marks. Tiered vitrified shelving holds stoppered ampoules and slumped-glass bins, each set into mirror-slag recesses that stabilize the shop’s calibrated sightlines. The air remains deliberately dry and faintly charged, keeping glass dust fixed to collection trays and preventing drift across stored abrasives. A narrow slit-lamp fed from the lightwell casts copper-white bands across labeled strata, turning inventory into an optical register of grade and grit.
